notableEvents.label: Nathan Lukes pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Nathan Lukes flies into a sacrifice double play, right fielder Tristan Peters to first baseman Munetaka Murakami to third baseman Miguel Vargas. Myles Straw scores. Tyler Heineman out at 3rd.

notableEvents.label: Error-aided run(s) allowed
notableEvents.detail: Luisangel Acuña singles on a ground ball to second baseman Ernie Clement. Miguel Vargas scores. Austin Hays scores. Throwing error by catcher Tyler Heineman, assist to second baseman Ernie Clement to third baseman Kazuma Okamoto. Luisangel Acuña out at 3rd on the throw, left fielder Myles Straw to shortstop Andrés Giménez.

notableEvents.label: Throwing error
notableEvents.detail: Luisangel Acuña singles on a ground ball to second baseman Ernie Clement. Miguel Vargas scores. Austin Hays scores. Throwing error by catcher Tyler Heineman, assist to second baseman Ernie Clement to third baseman Kazuma Okamoto. Luisangel Acuña out at 3rd on the throw, left fielder Myles Straw to shortstop Andrés Giménez.

notableEvents.label: Addison Barger pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Reese McGuire challenged (pitch result), call on the field was confirmed: Addison Barger walks.

notableEvents.label: Jesús Sánchez pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Jesús Sánchez singles on a line drive to left fielder Austin Hays. Andrés Giménez to 2nd.

notableEvents.label: Nathan Lukes pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Nathan Lukes grounds out to first baseman Munetaka Murakami.

notableEvents.label: Fielding error
notableEvents.detail: Daulton Varsho reaches on a fielder's choice. Davis Schneider to 3rd. Kazuma Okamoto to 2nd. Fielding error by first baseman Munetaka Murakami.

notableEvents.label: Andrew Benintendi pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Andrew Benintendi grounds out, second baseman Ernie Clement to first baseman Vladimir Guerrero Jr.
